reuse_existing.description: Use an already-live surface as the starting point with minimal structural change.

refine_existing.description: Keep the live surface but improve narrative, layout, or drill quality.

new_surface.description: Create a new asset because no current surface fits the ask cleanly.

paired_handoff.description: Use two coordinated surfaces, usually an executive summary plus a follow-up/action surface.

surface_fit.description: The chosen surface should match the decision style and depth of the ask.

excellence_pattern.description: The draft should align with a proven local excellence pattern or exemplar.

surface_visual_fit.description: The visual grammar should match the chosen surface and audience.

executive_story.description: Executive surfaces should lead with a story, not a raw queue.

manager_action_path.description: Manager and individual surfaces must end in a real action path or queue.

page_sprawl.description: The page model should stay within the expected budget for the selected surface pattern.

metric_contract.description: Metrics should be labeled as actual, target, forecast, variance, or risk.

baseline_only.description: A draft baseline still needs a critic pass before it is considered production-grade.

paired_handoff.description: Paired-handoff specs should name the secondary surface explicitly.
